mapper.select: select u.*, d.dept_id, d.title, d.specialty, d.work_time, d.daily_max_num, dp.dept_name from sys_user u left join hospital_doctor d on u.id = d.user_id left join hospital_department dp on d.dept_id = dp.id where u.id = #{id}

select u.*, d.dept_id, d.title, d.specialty, d.work_time, d.daily_max_num, dp.dept_name from sys_user u left join hospital_doctor d on u.id = d.user_id left join hospital_department dp on d.dept_id = dp.id where u.id in
#{item}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user( username, password, phone, identity_card, real_name, role_id, status, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{identityCard}, #{realName}, #{roleId}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO hospital_doctor( id, user_id, dept_id, title, specialty, work_time, daily_max_num, create_time, update_time ) SELECT NULL, -- 自增字段赋值NULL，数据库自动生成ID #{userId}, hd.id, -- 通过科室名称查询对应的科室ID #{title}, #{specialty}, #{workTime}, #{dailyMaxNum}, NOW(), NOW() FROM hospital_system.hospital_department hd WHERE hd.dept_name = #{deptName} -- 前端传入的科室名称 AND hd.status = 1 -- 只关联启用状态的科室 LIMIT 1; -- 确保只返回一条结果（科室名称唯一）
mapper.update: UPDATE hospital_doctor hd INNER JOIN hospital_system.hospital_department hdept ON hdept.dept_name = #{deptName} AND hdept.status = 1 -- 关联启用状态的科室 SET hd.dept_id = hdept.id, -- 通过科室名称获取dept_id hd.title = #{title}, hd.specialty = #{specialty}, hd.work_time = #{workTime}, hd.daily_max_num = #{dailyMaxNum}, hd.update_time = NOW() WHERE hd.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete:
delete from hospital_doctor where user_id in
#{item}
mapper.update: update sys_user set status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() where id = #{id} and role_id = 2
mapper.select: select status from sys_user where id = #{id} and role_id = 2
